name: rubric semver bumper appends a changelog entry when applied non-dry-run
command: mkdir -p rubric && printf 'version: 1.5.3\n' > rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && : > rubric/changelog.md && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/version-bump.sh" --rubric rubric/RUBRIC.yaml --change bugfix --apply --changelog rubric/changelog.md --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '## 1.5.4' rubric/changelog.md && grep -q '2026-05-13' rubric/changelog.md && echo ok 1>&2
